nasb.text: They are Your servants and Your people whom You redeemed by Your great power and by Your strong hand.

esv.text: They are your servants and your people, whom you have redeemed by your great power and by your strong hand.

cnv.text: 這些都是你的僕人，你的子民，是你用你的大能和你強而有力的手所救贖的。

ccb.text: 我们是你的仆人、你的子民，是你用大能大力救赎的。
